package.name: pzb_line_follower_cpp
package.description: C++ port of the line follower (center_line_detector + line_follower_node). Parallel to the Python pzb_line_follower; drop-in via the same node name, topics and parameters. Built to cut on-Jetson CPU/memory. Includes an offline rosbag comparator (replay_follower) that validates parity against recorded /line_follower/*.
